overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a first-person vehicle journey through mountainous coastal terrain. The drive transitions from dense pine forest on dirt roads to a rustic fishing settlement with beached boats, then returns through mountain passes across a metal truss bridge to paved roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain dirt road through dense pine forest

events.description: overtaking a slow-moving dark SUV ahead on the narrow dirt road
road begins to open up as forest density decreases approaching coastal area

agents.ego_description: navigating winding dirt road through dense forest, overtaking a vehicle ahead and passing a parked car near a roadside sign

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving slowly ahead on the dirt road before being overtaken
gray sedan parked near a roadside signboard

entered.detail: unpaved mountain road with visible tire tracks and loose gravel
tall evergreen trees forming dense canopy overhead
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the road
steep rock face rising alongside the road
wooden power line pole with overhead cables

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense mountain forest on a winding dirt road, overtaking a slow vehicle ahead. Tall pine trees create a partial canopy overhead while rocky cliffs rise on the right side. The scene transitions as the forest opens up toward the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic coastal fishing settlement with beached boats and wooden shacks

events.description: emerging from forest into open coastal area with first view of ocean water
slowing down to navigate between beached boats and wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: navigating through coastal settlement, carefully driving past wooden shacks and beached fishing boats near the shoreline

notable_agents.action: parked jeep near wooden shack on the left side

entered.detail: calm blue sea with small islands visible on the horizon
weathered wooden building with corrugated metal roof
large red fishing boat resting on wooden supports on shore
rotting wooden pier extending into the water
green and white boat on stands near shoreline shack

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a coastal fishing settlement with the ocean visible ahead. The vehicle drives past weathered wooden shacks and beached fishing boats resting on the shore, including a prominent red boat on the right. Wooden docks extend into the calm water as the camera navigates through the rustic settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain road returning inland with scattered residences

events.description: turning inland away from the coast back into mountain terrain
approaching metal truss bridge structure spanning a ravine

agents.ego_description: driving away from the coast through mountain terrain, passing a white house and approaching a metal bridge

entered.detail: weathered white wooden house with front porch and red trim
rusted steel truss bridge structure visible ahead
white metal road barrier along the left edge

segments.scene_description: Turning inland from the coast, the vehicle passes a white wooden house and returns to mountain terrain. The dirt road winds through sparser forest as the camera approaches a metal truss bridge visible in the distance, with guardrails appearing along the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved mountain road with guardrails and utility infrastructure

events.description: crossing the metal truss bridge onto newly paved asphalt surface
accelerating on smooth paved road after crossing bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the metal bridge and accelerating along the smooth paved mountain road with guardrails

entered.detail: smooth black paved road surface replacing the dirt trail
distant rocky mountain summit visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle crosses the metal truss bridge and transitions onto a smooth paved mountain road. Guardrails line the left side as the road winds through the terrain with distant mountain peaks visible ahead. The surface changes from dirt to asphalt allowing for faster travel through the scenic mountain pass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a dense mountain forest through a rustic coastal settlement and back into the highlands. It begins on a winding dirt road beneath a canopy of tall pine trees and rocky cliffs, overtaking a slow vehicle before the forest opens up toward the ocean. As the terrain shifts, the camera navigates a fishing village filled with weathered wooden shacks and beached boats, including a prominent red vessel resting near docks that extend into the calm water. The scene then turns inland past a white wooden house, returning to a sparser mountain landscape as the dirt road leads toward a distant metal truss bridge. Finally, the vehicle crosses the bridge and transitions onto a smooth paved road, winding through the scenic mountain pass with distant peaks visible ahead.
